title: GRASS BIOREFINERY
subtitle: Background
description: A demonstration project for a small-scale grass biorefinery in South West Ireland aimed at diversifying farmer produce and improving sustainability and resource efficiency in the livestock sector. The biorefinery converts freshly harvested grass into multiple co-products—including cattle feed fibre, non-GMO protein concentrate, prebiotic sugars, and bio-fertiliser—while targeting increased protein yield and reduced nitrogen and methane emissions.
